top3.sql:
SELECT buildUpPlaySpeedClass
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'Cercle Brugge'
ORDER BY ta.date DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT buildUpPlaySpeedClass
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'Cercle Brugge')
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT buildUpPlaySpeedClass
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'Cercle Brugge'
ORDER BY ta.date DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT buildUpPlaySpeedClass
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'Cercle Brugge')
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISTINCT buildUpPlaySpeedClass
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'KSV Cercle Brugge'
ORDER BY ta.date DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT buildUpPlaySpeedClass
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'Cercle Brugge'
ORDER BY ta.date DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT buildUpPlaySpeedClass
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'Cercle Brugge')
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISTINCT buildUpPlaySpeedClass
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'KSV Cercle Brugge'
ORDER BY ta.date DESC
LIMIT 1;
